hooks.command: REQ='d:/EMI APP/CLAUDE_SUPERVISOR_REQUEST.json'; FLAG='d:/EMI APP/CLAUDE_SUPERVISOR_RESPONSE.flag'; DONE='d:/EMI APP/AUDIT_DONE.flag'; if [ -f "$REQ" ] && [ ! -f "$FLAG" ]; then echo "Claude primary supervisor active — writing response flag"; echo "{\"supervisor\": \"Claude\", \"status\": \"audit_started\", \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\"}" > "$FLAG"; echo '{"systemMessage": "SUPERVISOR REQUEST DETECTED: Phase 1 build complete. Claude is now the primary auditor. Audit all generated code against PRD v3.0, check failed modules (backend-devices, backend-lock-engine, backend-notifications), verify security layers, and confirm Phase 2 readiness."}'; elif [ -f 'd:/EMI APP/BUILD_COMPLETE.flag' ] && [ ! -f "$DONE" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "BUILD COMPLETE: Phase 1 finished. Audit and write AUDIT_DONE.flag when complete."}'; fi

REQ='d:/EMI APP/CLAUDE_SUPERVISOR_REQUEST.json'; FLAG='d:/EMI APP/CLAUDE_SUPERVISOR_RESPONSE.flag'; if [ -f "$REQ" ] && [ ! -f "$FLAG" ]; then echo "[Stop hook] Claude supervisor active — writing response flag"; echo "{\"supervisor\": \"Claude\", \"status\": \"audit_started\", \"timestamp\": \"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\"}" > "$FLAG"; echo '{"systemMessage": "SUPERVISOR REQUEST DETECTED (Stop hook): Build complete. Claude is the primary auditor. Audit generated code against PRD v3.0, check failed modules, verify security layers, confirm Phase 2 readiness."}'; fi
